inboundText: /* Virtual query to fulfill MDSCHEMA_MEMBERS with TREE_OP:1 */ SELECT [DateCustom].[StandardMonth].[Year].&[2000-01-01T00:00:00].Children ON 0 FROM [ASAdventureSmall]
outboundText:
SELECT
   t_124.year_c9_c121 AS c0,
   t_124.key_c4_c123 AS c1s0,
   t_124.key_c1_c118 AS c2s0,
   t_124.half_year_c7_c120 AS c3,
   t_124.key_c2_c119 AS c4s0,
   t_124.key_c6_c122 AS c5s0,
   CONCAT('[DateCustom].[StandardMonth].[Year]', '.&[', COALESCE(CAST(FORMATDATETIME(t_124.key_c4_c123, 'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ss') AS VARCHAR), '__NULL__'), ']', '.&[', COALESCE(CAST(FORMATDATETIME(t_124.key_c2_c119, 'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ss') AS VARCHAR), '__NULL__'), ']') AS c6,
   CONCAT('[DateCustom].[StandardMonth].[Year]', '.&[', COALESCE(CAST(FORMATDATETIME(t_124.key_c4_c123, 'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ss') AS VARCHAR), '__NULL__'), ']') AS c7
FROM
(
   SELECT
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.half_year_c7 AS half_year_c7_c120,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c1 AS key_c1_c118,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c2 AS key_c2_c119,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c4 AS key_c4_c123,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c6 AS key_c6_c122,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.year_c9 AS year_c9_c121
   FROM
      tablecache.as_agg_52489dbf_hlfyr_qrtr_yr AS as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117
   WHERE
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c4 = '2000-01-01 00:00:00.000000000'
   GROUP BY
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.half_year_c7,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c1,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c2,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c4,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.key_c6,
      as_agg_52489dbf_hl_t117.year_c9
) AS t_124
WHERE
   true
GROUP BY
   t_124.year_c9_c121,
   t_124.key_c4_c123,
   t_124.key_c1_c118,
   t_124.half_year_c7_c120,
   t_124.key_c2_c119,
   t_124.key_c6_c122,
   CONCAT('[DateCustom].[StandardMonth].[Year]', '.&[', COALESCE(CAST(FORMATDATETIME(t_124.key_c4_c123, 'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ss') AS VARCHAR), '__NULL__'), ']', '.&[', COALESCE(CAST(FORMATDATETIME(t_124.key_c2_c119, 'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ss') AS VARCHAR), '__NULL__'), ']'),
   CONCAT('[DateCustom].[StandardMonth].[Year]', '.&[', COALESCE(CAST(FORMATDATETIME(t_124.key_c4_c123, 'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ss') AS VARCHAR), '__NULL__'), ']')
ORDER BY
   t_124.half_year_c7_c120 ASC
LIMIT 400

inboundText:
SELECT 
 { [Measures].[rolling-2 years] }  ON COLUMNS, 
  SUBSET( Hierarchize(  { [AccountBalance].[Account Type].[Account Type].Members }  )  , 0, 300)DIMENSION PROPERTIES HIERARCHY_UNIQUE_NAME, PARENT_UNIQUE_NAME ON ROWS 
  FROM [ASAdventureSmall]
outboundText:
SELECT
   MIN("t_67"."c_29") AS "c0",
   "t_67"."c1" AS "c1",
   "t_67"."c2s0" AS "c2s0",
   "t_67"."c3s0" AS "c3s0",
   "t_67"."c4" AS "c4"
FROM
(
   SELECT
      CAST(SUM(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT)) AS BIGINT) AS "c_29",
      "t_62"."c1" AS "c1",
      "t_62"."c2s0" AS "c2s0",
      "t_62"."c3s0" AS "c3s0",
      CASE WHEN (   CAST('[AccountBalance].[Account Type].[Account Type]' AS TEXT) IS NULL
OR
   CAST('.&[' AS TEXT) IS NULL
OR
   COALESCE(CAST("t_62"."c2s0" AS TEXT), CAST('__NULL__' AS TEXT)) IS NULL
OR
   CAST(']' AS TEXT) IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT(CAST('[AccountBalance].[Account Type].[Account Type]' AS TEXT), CAST('.&[' AS TEXT), COALESCE(CAST("t_62"."c2s0" AS TEXT), CAST('__NULL__' AS TEXT)), CAST(']' AS TEXT)) END AS "c4"
   FROM
   (
      SELECT
         CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS "c_29",
         "dimaccount_t61"."accounttype" AS "c1",
         "dimaccount_t61"."accounttype" AS "c2s0",
         "dimaccount_t61"."accounttype" AS "c3s0"
      FROM
         "asadventure"."dimaccount" AS "dimaccount_t61"
      WHERE
         true
      GROUP BY
         2,
         3,
         4
   ) AS "t_62"
   GROUP BY
      2,
      3,
      4,
      5
) AS "t_67"
GROUP BY
   2,
   3,
   4,
   5
ORDER BY
   2 ASC NULLS FIRST
